user.title: Coolblue Energy
user.description: Enter your Coolblue account credentials. Initial import might take a while.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Coolblue Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Coolblue Energy. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Coolblue account is already configured.

reimport_statistics.name: Reimport statistics
reimport_statistics.description: Force a full reimport of hourly electricity and gas statistics from the Coolblue Energy API starting from the given date up to and including yesterday. Existing recorder data for the range is overwritten and cumulative sums are recalculated, which fixes gaps or other artefacts in the Energy Dashboard.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The first day to reimport (inclusive). All days through yesterday will be fetched from the API and written to the recorder.
